title: Lithophragma heterophyllum
taxonomy: Lithophragma heterophyllum is classified within the family Santalaceae, which is a family of parasitic flowering plants commonly known as sandalwood and mistletoe. However, it can also be found in the family Orobanchaceae under some classifications. Some sources group this plant under the order Santalales, while others place it within the order Lamiales. The classification of this plant can be somewhat complex due to the ongoing debate among botanists. It is often referred to as a rare or unusual species.
